title: Buoyant Blocks
description: Place blocks in the top layer of water
body: This QoL (Quality of Life) plugin enhances the experience of starting a life at sea in Minecraft. By right-clicking the surface of the water with a solid block of your choice, the plugin automatically places the block in the water surface. This feature simplifies the process of building structures or creating a foundation on the water, making it more convenient and enjoyable for players who prefer an aquatic lifestyle in the game.
